chapter_title.en: The Reward of Helping a Believer, Relieving Him of Distress And Showing Him Kindness

parts.text: وعن أبي جعفر عليه السلام قال

text: : من مشى في حاجة لأخيه المسلم حتى يتمها أثبت الله قدميه يوم تزل الأقدام

en.muhajir-b-ali: 136. It has been reported that Abu Ja'far (a.s) said: One who goes a distance to help his Muslim brother until he completes it, Allah will steady his feet on the Day when feet shall waver and slip.
